title: Backend opinionated constraints
rationale: PostgreSQL only, Redis only, ARQ only, structlog only, JWT only, pytest only. No configuration drift. Dependency graph enforced by import-linter (10 contracts in pyproject.toml). New contributors make zero infrastructure decisions.

title: Frontend UIConfig-driven customization
rationale: UI is a rendering engine that reads UIConfig from API. One codebase serves all profiles (standard, icon, voice, high-contrast) without custom builds. CSS vars applied on mount from UIConfig store. Per-group config via common.UIConfig OneToOneField to Group.

title: Y.js CRDT for collaborative annotations
rationale: Dual persistence: normalized Annotation rows (search/filter/API) + binary YDocState (CRDT sync/offline). Written in single transaction. IndexedDB offline, y-websocket sync. Server-authoritative: group membership, media upload, job status, moderation flags, user accounts.

title: Hard fork from upstream papad
rationale: Preserves data model (Archive, Annotation, Group, Tags), W3C annotation structure, ffmpeg HLS pipeline, MinIO/S3, group permissions. Diverges: annotation types (5 vs 1), CRDT, threaded replies, exhibits, UIConfig, Whisper, architecture enforcement, SvelteKit replacing Vue 2, HLS.js replacing video.js.

name: Backend dependency graph
description: import-linter contracts in api/pyproject.toml. Direction: common <- users <- archive <- annotate <- {exhibit, media_relation}. crdt: common/archive/annotate. events: common only. importexport: common/users/archive/annotate. queue: leaf. Legacy exemptions frozen for common/ (9). All 13 apps mypy-strict, zero ANN exemptions.

name: Frontend module boundary graph
description: eslint-plugin-boundaries in ui/eslint.config.js. api.ts and hls.ts are leaves. events->api, crdt->stores, config->api, stores->config+crdt. primitives->hls. components->api+stores+config+events+i18n+primitives+hls. routes->anything in lib/. Violations fail lint.
